zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Neville於大約1221年出生在英國達勒姆拉比時，她的父親Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville25歲，母親Joan Monmouth18歲。她於1242年之前與Richard de Percy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1293年7月20日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍可尼享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾惠特比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Neville was born about 1221, in Raby, Durham, England, her father, Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville, was 25 and her mother, Joan Monmouth, was 18. She married Richard de Percy before 1242. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 20 July 1293, in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Neville est née environ 1221, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Monmouth, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Percy avant 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1293, à Blankney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Neville um 1221 in Raby, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville 25 und ihre Mutter Joan Monmouth 18. Sie hat vor 1242 Richard de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1293 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Blankney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Richard de Percy prima del 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 20 luglio 1293, nel Blankney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Whitby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Nevilleが約1221年にイギリスダルハムラビーで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Nevilleは25歳，母Joan Monmouthは18歳であった。1242年以前にRichard de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1293年7月20日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブランクニーで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Neville(이)가 대략 1221년 영국 뒤람 라비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Monmouth(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1242년 이전 Richard de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1293년 7월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 블랭니에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Neville родилась около 1221 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Neville 1st Baron de Neville было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Monmouth, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Percy перед 1242 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 20 июля 1293 г. в местности бланни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
